calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rena Harel (Current Trustee). Elizabeth Hansen for Laura Jaramillo (Prior Trustee/Beneficiary). Charles Jonas for Alberta Rivera (Beneficiary).

Ms. Ng stated she remained neutral as she was not part of the mediation and settlement agreement. Mr. Jonas and Ms. Hansen presented argument to support their positions with regard to their requests for reimbursements. The Court directed the parties to confer, outside the presence of the Court, to resolve the remaining issues. Upon returning the parties reported that there was no objection as to the reimbursement of $927.86 to Laura Jaramillo and that the parties agreed that the amount of $1223.87 for fire insurance should be considered a trust expense and therefore reimbursed to Alberta Rivera. In addition, Mr. Jonas waived his clients request for reimbursements as to the PG&E and Sunset Scavenger bills. The accounting petition will be granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Reimbursement Of Attorney'S Fees And For Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rena Harel. Edward Broitman for Alberta Rivera.

There being no objections, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (16 Prague St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Trustee.

Ms. Ng informed the Court that the re-appraisal had been filed this morning. The sale was confirmed at $405,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $333,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same).

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: F. Smith; Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Direct Current Trustee To Report And Account
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Broitman for Alberta Rivera (Petitioner)
Mr. Broitman informed the court of the resignation of the trustee, and stated that the house is the only asset and no accounting had been ordered.
The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Ex Parte Petition Of Beneficiary To Suspend Trustee'S Powers And To Appoint Temporary Successor Trustee Pending Hearing On Removal Of Trustee (Probate Code Sections 15642 And 17200)
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. CHARLES A. JONAS FOR THE PETITIONER ALBERTA RIVERA;
ATTY. ELIZABETH HANSEN FOR THE OBJECTOR LAURA JARAMILLO BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

MS. HANSEN REPORTED TO THE COURT HER OPPOSITION BEING THAT HER CLIENT WAS NOT THE ONE WHO FAILED TO PERFORM THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SHE WAS MAKING PARTIAL PAYMENT TO WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK. THE PETITIONER FAILED TO PERFORM HER OBLIGATION AND WAS NOT MAKING THE OTHER HALF OF THE PAYMENT. MR. JONAS STATED THAT THE BANK WAS NOT ACCEPTING PARTIAL PAYMENT. THE PARTIES HAVE NO COMMUNICATION AT ALL. THE PROPERTY IS NOW IN THE FORECLOSURE PROCESS. MS. HANSEN STATED THAT ALBERTA SHOULD PAY THE ARRERAGES FOR FAILURE TO PERFORM THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE COURT STATED THAT A NEUTRAL PERSON SHOULD NEGOTIATE WITH THE BANK REGARDING ARREARAGES, PUT THE HOUSE ON THE MARKET AND THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE IF IT OCCURS SHOULD BE ADJUSTED DEPENDING ON PAYMENTS MADE AND THE PARTY THAT CAUSE THE EXPENSE SHOULD BE CHARGED. IT IS ORDERED THAT LAURA M. JARAMILLO, TRUSTEE OF SAID HAROLD J. JARAMILLO TRUST IS HEREBY SUSPENDED AND THAT RENA HAREL BE APPOINTED TEMPORARY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE TO SERVE WITHOUT BOND PENDING HEARING ON PETITIONER'S PETITION TO REMOVE TRUSTEE OR PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF SALE. MS. HAREL SHALL HAVE THE AUTHORITY TO SELL THE TRUST PROPERTY SUBJECT TO COURT CONFIRMATION.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Cruz

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Instrument, To Remove Trustee, To Require Accounting, To Appoint Successor Trustee, To Authorize Sale Of Trust Property To Surcharge Trustee And For Intructions Re Deposit Of Proceeds In Blocked Account

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Instrument, To Remove Trustee, To Require Accounting, To Appoint Successor Trustee, To Authorize Sale Of Trust Property To Surcharge Trustee And For Intructions Re Deposit Of Proceeds In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Continued To Jun-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Charles Jonas appearing for petitioner. Elizabeth Hansen appearing for Laura Jaramaillo, trustee/respondent. Both counsel agreed to referral to pro bono mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 5/15. Matter is continued to 6/5 for status conference. If matter is not settled, Couurt will set a trial date.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Instrument, To Remove Trustee, To Require Accounting, To Appoint Successor Trustee, To Authorize Sale Of Trust Property To Surcharge Trustee And For Intructions Re Deposit Of Proceeds In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas (Counsel for Alberta Rivera, Petitioner); Elizabeth Hansen (Counsel for Laura Jaramillo, Trustee); Alberta Rivera (present in court).

Counsel advised the Court that the matter would require discovery and an evidentiary hearing on the merits. The Court set the matter for status and trial setting on March 6, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Instrument, To Remove Trustee, To Require Accounting, To Appoint Successor Trustee, To Authorize Sale Of Trust Property To Surcharge Trustee And For Intructions Re Deposit Of Proceeds In Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Continued To Jan-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Katherine Murphy special appearing for Elizabeth Hansen. Charles Jonas appearing for petitioner. Counsel agreed to a continuance. Ms. Hansen was injured. Matter is continued to 1/9/07. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Application For Determination That Propsed Peition
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Charles Jonas appearing for petitioner Alberta Rivera. Elizabeth Hansen appearing for and with objector Laura Jaramillo. Tentative Ruling is Petition is granted. The purposed petition would not violate the terms of the no contest clause. Oral argument presented by both counsel. Petition granted. Order signed after review by both counsel. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
